name: Vidalia First Baptist Church
description: Vidalia First Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Vidalia, LA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Vidalia Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Vidalia Tennis Courts in Vidalia, LA! There are 12 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.
